  Thanks for contributing to Kotoba!
  Please fill in the sections below. Delete sections that don't apply.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? Link any related issues with `Closes #N` or `Refs #N`. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📝 Docs only
- [ ] 🗂️ Deck content
- [ ] 🔌 Integration / plugin
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] 🧪 Tests / CI
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change

## How was this tested?

<!--
  - For code: which tests did you add/run? Any manual verification steps?
  - For docs/decks: how did you verify formatting/correctness?
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` is clean (if Rust files changed).
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes.
- [ ] `cargo test` passes locally.
- [ ] Added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## Unreleased` for user-facing changes.
- [ ] Updated docs and the README if behavior, flags, or formats changed.
- [ ] No `unwrap()` introduced in library code without a documented invariant.

## Screenshots / GIFs (optional but appreciated)

<!-- TUI changes, CLI output, plugin demos — visual aids help reviewers a lot. -->
